text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf has made her mark on the Twinkle
Series, just as she always hoped.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now that we're moving on to the next stage
of our lives, I find myself taking a moment to
reflect.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As much as I hate to disturb you, Trainer, it's
about time we faced the press.
choice_data_list: Hm? Have you been here long?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A little while. I meant to get your attention, but
you seemed lost in thought.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: If it's important, I can give you a moment.
choice_data_list: I was just looking back on the past three years.
I was just looking back on the past three years.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They passed us by in an instant, didn't they? Time
truly does fly like an arrow.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But let's not be so hasty as to sink into
melancholy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The media awaits us. The eyes of the world are
still on us.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You wouldn't abandon my dream at this late
hour, would you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: A fine answer, and just the one I had hoped for.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Come, Trainer. Let us set out once more. Our
journey is far from over.
